title: reactive/Observable integration (was jssm#690)
manager: Expose a machine's state and events as an Observable (RxJS-style stream), so reactive codebases can subscribe to a machine the way they subscribe to everything else instead of bolting on manual hook plumbing. The ledger flags it to be revisited against the v11 channels design — channels are the native emission model, and this is the adapter that projects them into the reactive-streams world people already build UIs on.
